meta.sourceFiling: Plus500 RNS Announcement (2026-02-03) — US Prediction Markets Launch

data.title: Plus500 Launches US Prediction Markets Platform
data.fullText:
LONDON, February 3, 2026 — Plus500 has expanded into the U.S. retail prediction-markets segment with the launch of event-based contracts on its domestic B2C platform, Plus500 Futures.

The move introduces products from Kalshi, the first regulated event-based contracts exchange in the United States, marking a strategic step for the multi-asset fintech group.

Prediction markets, which allow traders to express views on real-world outcomes, have gained momentum among retail and institutional users as a transparent and regulated alternative to traditional derivatives.

Plus500 said its entry into the sector aligns with its focus on technology-driven product expansion and customer-centric innovation.

The company will offer U.S. retail clients access to a wide range of regulated markets tied to economic indicators, financial events, geopolitical developments and other measurable outcomes.

Trades will be cleared using Plus500's full clearing membership with Kalshi Klear LLC, leveraging the group's existing risk-management infrastructure.

The launch follows Plus500's December 2025 appointment as clearing partner for FanDuel and CME Group's event-based contracts platform.

Plus500 added that combining its B2C product development with its established B2B clearing capabilities leaves the group well placed to capture opportunities as prediction markets grow in regulatory clarity and investor adoption.

Headquartered in Haifa, Israel; founded 2008 by six Technion alumni. FTSE 250 constituent.

The move introduces products from Kalshi, the first regulated event-based contracts exchange in the United States, marking a strategic step for the multi-asset fintech group.

script: Hi, I'm Gerardo. LSE-listed Plus500 has launched a regulated US prediction markets platform, bringing event-based contracts from Kalshi — the first regulated event-based contracts exchange in the United States — to retail clients of Plus500 Futures. Trades are cleared directly through Plus500's full clearing membership with Kalshi Klear, leveraging the group's existing risk-management infrastructure. The platform covers economic indicators, financial events, geopolitical developments and other measurable outcomes. The move could drive further growth as Plus500 expands beyond its core OTC offering. The potential upside from combining B2C product development with established B2B clearing capabilities could reshape retail derivatives. Investors should consider whether prediction markets position Plus500 for long-term expansion. The launch follows Plus500's December 2025 appointment as clearing partner for FanDuel and CME Group's event-based contracts platform. That's today's Plus500 snapshot.

script: Hi, I'm Gerardo.

LSE-listed Plus500 has launched a regulated US prediction markets platform, bringing event-based contracts from Kalshi — the first regulated event-based contracts exchange in the United States — to retail clients of Plus500 Futures.
Trades are cleared directly through Plus500's full clearing membership with Kalshi Klear, leveraging the group's existing risk-management infrastructure.
The platform covers economic indicators, financial events, geopolitical developments and other measurable outcomes.
Plus500 said the launch aligns with its focus on technology-driven product expansion and customer-centric innovation.
The company combines B2C product development with its established B2B clearing capabilities.
The launch follows Plus500's December 2025 appointment as clearing partner for FanDuel and CME Group's event-based contracts platform.
That's today's Plus500 snapshot.
Hallo, ich bin Gerardo.

Der an der LSE notierte Broker Plus500 hat eine regulierte Prediction-Markets-Plattform in den USA gestartet und bietet Privatkunden von Plus500 Futures Event-Kontrakte von Kalshi an — der ersten regulierten Event-Kontrakt-Börse in den Vereinigten Staaten.
Die Abwicklung erfolgt direkt über Plus500 im Rahmen der vollständigen Clearing-Mitgliedschaft bei Kalshi Klear und nutzt die bestehende Risikomanagement-Infrastruktur der Gruppe.
Die Plattform deckt Wirtschaftsindikatoren, Finanzereignisse, geopolitische Entwicklungen und weitere messbare Ereignisse ab.
Plus500 erklärte, der Start stehe im Einklang mit dem Fokus auf technologiegetriebener Produkterweiterung und kundenzentrierter Innovation.
Das Unternehmen verbindet seine B2C-Produktentwicklung mit den etablierten B2B-Clearing-Fähigkeiten.
Der Start folgt auf die Ernennung von Plus500 im Dezember 2025 zum Clearing-Partner für die Event-Kontrakt-Plattform von FanDuel und CME Group.
Das war der heutige Plus500-Schnappschuss.
Ciao, sono Gerardo.

Plus500, quotata al LSE, ha lanciato una piattaforma regolamentata di prediction markets negli Stati Uniti, portando contratti event-based di Kalshi — la prima borsa regolamentata di contratti event-based negli Stati Uniti — ai clienti retail di Plus500 Futures.
Le negoziazioni vengono regolate direttamente attraverso l'adesione di Plus500 al clearing di Kalshi Klear, sfruttando l'infrastruttura di risk management esistente del gruppo.
La piattaforma copre indicatori economici, eventi finanziari, sviluppi geopolitici e altri eventi misurabili.
Plus500 ha dichiarato che il lancio è in linea con il focus su espansione di prodotto guidata dalla tecnologia e innovazione customer-centric.
L'azienda combina lo sviluppo di prodotti B2C con le capacità di clearing B2B consolidate.
Il lancio segue la nomina di Plus500 a dicembre 2025 come clearing partner per la piattaforma di contratti event-based di FanDuel e CME Group.
Questa è l'istantanea di Plus500 di oggi.
こんにちは、ジェラルドです。
LSE上場のPlus500は、米国で規制されたプレディクション・マーケット・プラットフォームを立ち上げ、Plus500 Futuresのリテール顧客向けに、米国で初めて規制されたイベント契約取引所であるKalshiのイベント契約を提供します。
取引はPlus500のKalshi Klearクリアリング・メンバーシップを通じて直接清算され、グループの既存のリスク管理インフラが活用されます。
このプラットフォームは、経済指標、金融イベント、地政学的動向、その他の測定可能な事象をカバーします。
Plus500は、今回のローンチが、テクノロジー主導の製品拡大と顧客中心のイノベーションへの注力と一致すると述べました。
同社はB2C製品開発と確立されたB2Bクリアリング能力を組み合わせています。
今回のローンチは、Plus500が2025年12月にFanDuelおよびCMEグループのイベント契約プラットフォームのクリアリング・パートナーに任命されたことに続くものです。
以上、本日のPlus500スナップショットでした。
مرحباً، أنا جيراردو.

أطلقت شركة Plus500 المدرجة في بورصة لندن منصة أسواق تنبؤ منظّمة في الولايات المتحدة، لتقدّم لعملاء Plus500 Futures عقوداً مرتبطة بالأحداث من Kalshi — أول بورصة منظّمة للعقود المرتبطة بالأحداث في الولايات المتحدة.
تُقاصّ الصفقات مباشرة عبر عضوية Plus500 الكاملة في Kalshi Klear، مستفيدة من البنية التحتية القائمة لإدارة المخاطر لدى المجموعة.
تغطّي المنصة المؤشرات الاقتصادية والأحداث المالية والتطورات الجيوسياسية وسائر الأحداث القابلة للقياس.
قالت Plus500 إن الإطلاق يتماشى مع تركيزها على توسيع المنتجات المدفوع بالتكنولوجيا والابتكار الموجّه نحو العميل.
تجمع الشركة بين تطوير منتجات B2C وقدرات المقاصة B2B الراسخة.
يأتي هذا الإطلاق بعد تعيين Plus500 في ديسمبر 2025 شريكاً للمقاصة في منصة العقود المرتبطة بالأحداث لـ FanDuel ومجموعة CME.
تلك كانت لقطة Plus500 لليوم.

data.finalScript: Hi, I'm Gerardo. LSE-listed Plus500 has launched a regulated US prediction markets platform, bringing event-based contracts from Kalshi — the first regulated event-based contracts exchange in the United States — to retail clients of Plus500 Futures. Trades are cleared directly through Plus500's full clearing membership with Kalshi Klear, leveraging the group's existing risk-management infrastructure. The platform covers economic indicators, financial events, geopolitical developments and other measurable outcomes. Plus500 said the launch aligns with its focus on technology-driven product expansion and customer-centric innovation. The company combines B2C product development with its established B2B clearing capabilities. The launch follows Plus500's December 2025 appointment as clearing partner for FanDuel and CME Group's event-based contracts platform. That's today's Plus500 snapshot.
